items.title: Australia’s Jackson Irvine has no sympathy for Paraguay after historic World Cup red card
items.summary: Miguel Almirón sent off against Turkey for covering mouth Socceroos face South Americans in crucial last Group D match Socceroo Jackson Irvine has backed the decision by Fifa to send players off for covering their mouths when they speak, after Paraguay winger Miguel Almirón was given a historic red

items.title: Brian Brobbey bags a brace and Deniz Undav, supersub: World Cup Daily – podcast
items.summary: Max Rushden is joined by Barry Glendenning , Dan Bardell and Leander Schaerlaeckens as the Netherlands thrash Sweden and Germany get a late winner against Côte d’Ivoire Rate, review, share on Apple Podcasts and join the conversation on email . On the podcast today: the Netherlands hammer Sweden 5-1

items.title: Tunisia 0 Japan 4: Asian side win 1,000th World Cup match in style as Herve Renard has disastrous managerial debut
items.summary: A SUPERB Japan eased past Tunisia in the 1,000th World Cup game of all time. Japan went into their second fixture having been held to a 1-1 draw by the Netherlands, while Tunisia were thrashed by Sweden. Tunisia had been hoping to have a new manager bounce after sacking former Nottingham Forest boss

items.title: Meet the record-equalling keeper who helped Curacao make history
items.summary: Curacao's Eloy Room makes a record-equalling 15 saves to help his tiny island nation to a first World Cup point against Ecuador.

items.title: Goalline technology denies Japan goal by fractions
items.summary: Tunisia goalkeeper Aymen Dahmen makes an "unbelievable save" to prevent Japan from doubling their lead by the finest of margins, in their 2026 World Cup match at Estadio Monterrey.

items.title: Glamorous former mayor forced to issue statement about her boobs after causing stir with revealing outfit at World Cup
items.summary: SANDRA CUEVAS has been forced to issue a statement about her boobs after causing a stir at the World Cup.
